mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that reduces discount rates for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in periods of FEDFUNDS decline are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03 over 2-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 240 in CPIAUCSL triggers central bank rate hikes, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in CPIAUCSL > 240 periods exceed 0.5% average or Rank IC > 0.05 over 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in PAYEMS and declining UNRATE signal a tightening labor market, boosting consumer spending and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in interacting PAYEMS/UNRATE regimes show negative or insignificant Rank IC (< 0.03) over 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rising RSAFS combined with high HOUST indicate strong consumer and housing demand, creating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns in RSAFS/HOUST rising regimes show negative or insignificant Rank IC (< 0.03) over 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A 1% month-over-month increase in INDPRO signals robust industrial production, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns in INDPRO > 105 periods show negative or insignificant Rank IC (< 0.03) over 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate below 5% indicates a tight labor market, increasing wage pressures and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in UNRATE < 5% periods show negative or insignificant Rank IC (< 0.03) over 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDPC1 and HOUST indicates strong economic demand, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns in GDPC1/HOUST rising regimes show negative or insignificant Rank IC (< 0.03) over 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of low FEDFUNDS and rising CPIAUCSL signals stagflation risks, creating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in FEDFUNDS/CPIAUCSL interacting regimes show positive or insignificant Rank IC (> -0.03) over 2-year windows.
